fields.name: Sarah Chen
fields.expertise_tags: refrigerated cargo, temperature-sensitive, cold chain, perishables, reefer containers, temperature excursion
fields.bio: Sarah leads EMEA perishable and temperature-controlled cargo claims. She has managed major reefer losses across European and Middle Eastern ports and is the go-to handler for cold chain documentation disputes.

fields.name: James Okafor
fields.expertise_tags: bulk commodity, general cargo, breakbulk, steel, grain, fertiliser, container shipping
fields.bio: James handles bulk and general cargo losses across EMEA, with particular experience in West African transit routes and port damage claims at Rotterdam, Hamburg, and Antwerp.

fields.name: Priya Nair
fields.expertise_tags: third-party liability, product liability, bodily injury, personal injury, recall, regulatory exposure
fields.bio: Priya manages third-party and product liability claims across APAC. She has extensive experience with cross-border litigation in Singapore and Hong Kong jurisdiction and has handled several product recall cases for food and pharmaceutical exporters.

fields.name: Marco Bianchi
fields.expertise_tags: hull, perishables, cargo transit, vessel damage, dry-dock, constructive total loss, refrigerated cargo
fields.bio: Marco is a senior handler covering both hull and cargo lines in the Americas. Based in Miami, he regularly manages losses across South American ports and has deep expertise in vessel damage assessment and total loss negotiations with P&I clubs.

fields.name: Ayesha Rahman
fields.expertise_tags: commercial property, general liability, fire, flood, warehouse damage, slip and fall, business interruption
fields.bio: Ayesha handles commercial property and general liability claims across EMEA. She has particular experience in warehouse and logistics hub losses and regularly works with loss adjusters across the UK, France, and the Gulf states.

fields.name: Lena Park
fields.speciality: marine cargo, bulk commodity, and container shipping
fields.expertise_tags: marine cargo, bulk commodity, container shipping, electronics, automotive parts, Korean ports, China routes
fields.bio: Lena manages marine cargo claims across APAC with a focus on Korea-China-Japan trade routes and high-value consumer electronics and automotive component shipments. She is fluent in Korean and Mandarin.

fields.name: Carlos Mendez
fields.expertise_tags: third-party liability, product liability, bodily injury, premises liability, trucking liability, US litigation
fields.bio: Carlos handles third-party and product liability claims across the Americas, with a focus on US and Mexican jurisdiction. He has managed complex trucking liability cases and multi-party bodily injury claims in both federal and state courts.

fields.name: Diana Walsh
fields.expertise_tags: commercial property, general liability, natural catastrophe, wind, flood, fire, business interruption, CAT claims
fields.bio: Diana specialises in commercial property and CAT claims across the Americas. She has extensive experience managing large-scale natural catastrophe losses including hurricane, flood, and wildfire events across the US and Caribbean.

fields.name: Tom Kowalski
fields.expertise_tags: complex claims, multi-line, high-value, escalation, cross-border, regulatory, catastrophic loss, legal exposure
fields.bio: Tom leads the escalation desk for critical and complex multi-line claims globally. He coordinates across claim types, jurisdictions, and reinsurance structures. Prior to Nacora he spent eight years at Lloyd's managing major loss events and catastrophic liability cases.
